heading_content_part: Additionally, we and/or our trusted partners may contact you from time to time with offers that may interest you and/or to inform you of other products and services. Certain of your personal data may be shared with other users of the Apps as part of the normal operation of the Services (for example your uploaded profile picture and biographical information will be accessible to all users, and we may publish your total verified steps, or other movement, during a particular period to other users from time to time). Further, we may, from time to time, expand or reduce our business which may involve the transfer of certain divisions or assets of our company to other parties, and the data we store and use, where relevant, may be transferred to such third parties. We are located in the British Virgin Islands and by submitting your data to us, if you are located in the United Kingdom or the European Economic Area, you are transferring your data outside of the European Economic Area. From time to time we may transfer data we store and use in the UK or the European Economic Area to locations outside the European Economic Area, some of which may have different data protection laws to the UK or the EU, or no data protection laws. In all such cases, we transmit such information only to entities that comply with this policy and applicable law.

We take reasonable industry-standard care in keeping all our data secure and in preventing any unauthorised access or unlawful use of it. All personal data we store and process is handled strictly in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.

ident_heading: DATA ON THE BLOCKCHAIN
heading_content_part: DATA ON THE BLOCKCHAIN

decoder_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
ident_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
heading_content_part: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted. We take steps to anonymise that data and no contact details or other personal information identifying you is included in that information. The information following is included:The number of verified steps taken that caused the minting transaction to occur;

decoder_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
ident_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
heading_content_part: The amount of SWEAT received by the recipient as a result of the minting transaction caused by those verified steps;The date and time on which those verified steps were converted into SWEAT by the minting transaction (but not the date and time on which those steps were actually taken);The public key (unique, anonymous crypto reference) of the Wallet that received the SWEAT at the minting transaction.

decoder_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
ident_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
heading_content_part: Although this data is anonymous, your public key could be used to personally identify you if you provide it to a third party as any third party can read the information included in the blockchain. Neither the Sweat Foundation nor any of its affiliates control the blockchain. you should therefore assume that this data will be available publicly in perpetuity. You should therefore either avoid using the Service or avoid sharing your public key if you do not wish for people to link this information with you personally.

decoder_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
ident_heading: In order to provide the Service, the minting of SWEAT requires certain data to be included in the data shown on the blockchain relating to the SWEAT at the time it is minted.
heading_content_part: You may opt out of this information being included in the blockchain but in order for you to continue receiving SWEAT you must give and maintain your consent to The Sweat Foundation and its affiliates processing your data in accordance with this policy. This will not affect any historic SWEAT minting transactions. The data relating to those shall remain on the blockchain indefinitely.For more information about blockchains and SWEAT please review our FAQshere.

decoder_heading: We use cookies to distinguish you from other users of the Apps and Sweat Foundation Website(s) and obtain certain information about your usage and behaviour.

heading_content_part: We use cookies to distinguish you from other users of the Apps and Sweat Foundation Website(s) and obtain certain information about your usage and behaviour. A cookie is a small file of letters and numbers that we put on your computer when you use the Apps or Sweat Foundation Website(s). This helps us to provide you with a better experience when you use the Apps or browse the Sweat Foundation Website(s) and also allows us to improve the Services. We will use both persistent cookies, which could remain on your device until their expiration (which, in some cases, is up to 10 years), and session cookies, which are temporary files removed from your device once your browser is closed.
